records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 7:26 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2018/09/22/upgrading-to-the.html)

records.heading: ### [Monday @ 4:16 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2018/11/12/after-a-couple.html)
records.body: After a couple calls it sounds like Ukraine is fine with a passport expiring within 6 months, as long as it’s valid for your trip. Should be good to go! 👍🏻 🇺🇦 ✈️

records.heading: ### [Monday @ 2:51 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2018/11/12/i-might-be.html)
records.body: I might be learning the hard way about flying internationally when your passport expires within 6 months. 😕

records.heading: ### [Monday @ 4:59 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2018/11/12/wait-the-newest.html)
records.body: Wait, the newest version of Apple Photos cannot import DNG files? What the … 😤

records.heading: ### [Tuesday @ 3:54 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2018/11/13/im-finding-myself.html)
records.body: I’m finding myself frustrated with pure static hosting. It adds too much friction [to publishing. I’m intrigued by Statamic](https://statamic.com) as a ‘best of both worlds’ option. If people have experience with it, I’d love to hear those.

records.heading: ### [Tuesday @ 1:22 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2018/11/13/the-new-ipad.html)
records.body: The new 12.9” iPad Pro with the attached keyboard is a good size for an airline seat tray. The previous generation 12.9” I found too large for flights and used the smaller one. This one works fine with keyboard.

records.heading: ### [Friday @ 7:17 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2018/11/16/back-in-minneapolis.html)
records.body: Back in Minneapolis! Luggage made it through the short transfer too! 👍🏻

records.heading: ### [Wednesday @ 8:30 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/01/30/over-members-of.html)
records.body: Over 50 members of #TeamSPS Tech shared demos, milestones, learnings, and upcoming plans today. It was incredible to see how we are continuing to advance! Great tech organizations are learning organizations, and we learn fast! I am humbled to be surrounded by so much talent!

records.heading: ### [Thursday @ 8:47 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/02/28/at-mhta-tech.html)
records.body: [At MHTA Tech Talent](https://mhta.org/event/techtalent/) event today, [participating in panel shortly. Mike McNamara](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mike-mcnamara-04598226/) , CIO of Target, kicking it off. Event focused on efforts to increase diversity and inclusion in technology. Looking forward to [sharing our progress at SPS Commerce](https://spscommerce.com) .

records.heading: ### [Thursday @ 4:29 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/02/28/improving-diversity-in.html)
records.body: Improving diversity In tech: York Solutions; Genesis10; Prime Digital Academy; Creating IT Futures; Software Guild; Summit Academy; Minnesota State IT Center of Excellence; Dougherty Family College; Apprenti; Keyot Crew212; Twin Cities Rise; Genesys Works; SciTechsperience

records.heading: ### [Thursday @ 4:39 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/02/28/it-was-great.html)
records.body: It was great to be able to share the impressive work we’ve done at SPS Commerce to make a technology career more inclusive and accessible. A lot of progress and momentum for more! [Thanks to @pattonamyj for the picture](https://twitter.com/pattonamyj/status/1101150885915299840) !

records.heading: ### [Thursday @ 12:30 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/02/28/some-very-insightful.html)

records.heading: ### [Wednesday @ 9:38 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/03/franklin-bbq-was.html)
records.body: [Franklin BBQ](https://franklinbbq.com) was amazing today. The brisket was the best I’ve ever had by a bunch. The ribs were delicious. The pulled pork was good. Also tried the Turkey special which was tasty. 👍🏻🤤🍽

records.heading: ### [Wednesday @ 8:40 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/03/full-fanboy-mode.html)

records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 9:29 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/13/got-to-watch.html)

records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 7:26 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/13/hard-fought-mnufc.html)

records.heading: ### [Wednesday @ 7:00 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/17/excited-to-be.html)
records.body: Excited to be at the [2019 Minnesota Aspirations in Computing Awards](https://mnstateitcoe.org/announcing-the-2019-minnesota-aspirations-for-women-in-computing-awards-honorees/) honoring amazing young women starting careers in technology! Very happy that #TeamSPS can be part of it!

records.heading: ### [Wednesday @ 7:25 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/17/fun-and-inspiring.html)

records.heading: ### [Wednesday @ 10:00 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/17/the-minnesota-aspirations.html)
records.body: The [2019 Minnesota Aspirations in Computing Awards](https://mnstateitcoe.org/announcing-the-2019-minnesota-aspirations-for-women-in-computing-awards-honorees/) Honorees tonight were very impressive! Congratulations to all of you! 🎉 #TeamSPS was there to celebrate and welcome the four interns joining SPS Commerce this summer. #MNAiC2019

records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 9:50 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/27/good-session-at.html)

records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 8:51 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/27/great-energy-going.html)

records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 9:39 AM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/04/27/we-have-a.html)

I’ve been lucky to be involved with this organization since the [beginning and love that SPS Commerce](https://jobs.spscommerce.com) is a terabyte sponsor! #minnebar

records.heading: ### [Thursday @ 7:25 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/11/14/lets-go-wild.html)
records.body: Let’s go Wild! Wild v Coyotes tonight at Xcel Center! 🏒

records.heading: ### [Thursday @ 9:16 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/11/14/wild-go-ahead.html)
records.body: Wild go ahead 2-1 over Coyotes after Parise goal! 😊🏒 Oh wait, now Coyotes tie it back up 2-2. 😬

records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 9:26 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/12/07/enjoyed-winter-fireworks.html)
records.body: Enjoyed winter [fireworks at Loring Park for Holidazzle](https://www.holidazzle.com) tonight!

records.heading: ### [Saturday @ 9:04 PM](https://www.thingelstad.com/2019/12/07/we-went-to.html)
records.body: [We went to Holidazzle](https://www.holidazzle.com) for the first time in years and years. Last time we went it was still a parade. It was fun, but there were a lot of people and big lines.
